artifact.description: The artifact this check is about, if any (e.g. `decision:loan-eligibility@3.2.0`).

expected.description: Expected value for a failed check (structured, not prose).

actual.description: Actual value for a failed check (structured, not prose).

diff.description: A short structured diff string; supplements expected/actual.

value.description: Metric value for a coverage-style check.

threshold.description: Metric threshold for a coverage-style check.

description:
One check result. Failures carry a structured diff (expected/actual/artifact), never a
sentence. `id` is stable across runs so a dashboard and an agent track the same check.
